simplesect.para: true if initialization successful, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set log level for a specific tag.
Get log level for a specific tag.
Log a message at ERROR level.
Log a message at WARN level.
Log a message at INFO level.
Log a message at DEBUG level.
Log a message at VERBOSE level.

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag, const char *format,...) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: Log

briefdescription.para: Log a message at specified level.

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag, const char *format, va_list args) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: LogV

briefdescription.para: Log a message with va_list (for internal use)

memberdef.argsstring: (hf_log_level_t level, const char *tag, const char *file, hf_u32_t line, const char *function, const char *format,...) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: LogWithLocation

briefdescription.para: Log a message with file and line information.
Check if a log level is enabled for a tag.

simplesect.para: true if level is enabled, false otherwise

parameterdescription.para: Log tag for the output (optional, uses implementation-specific default if nullptr)
If true, prints detailed per-level statistics
Log tag for the output (optional, uses implementation-specific default if nullptr)
If true, prints detailed diagnostic information
Log tag for the output (optional, uses implementation-specific default if nullptr)

detaileddescription.para:
This class provides a comprehensive logging abstraction that supports:
Multiple log levels (ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG, VERBOSE)
Thread-safe operations
Configurable output destinations
Performance monitoring and statistics
Error handling and diagnostics
Custom output callbacks
Message formatting and buffering
